last_episode_to_air.name: The Girls' Machiavellism
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the battle continues, Nomura doesn't hold back, and someone seems to have a personal interest in the fight.

name: Armed Girl's Machiavellism
original_name: 武装少女マキャヴェリズム
overview:
The Private Aichi Symbiosis Academy was originally a high school for high-class girls. When it became co-ed, the girls, out of fear, asked to be permitted to bring weapons to school. When that was enforced, a five-member vigilante corps-like organization called the "Supreme Five Swords" was also formed.

After many generations, the five swords eventually became a group which corrected problematic students, and the academy started proactively accepting such students in order to correct them.

Nomura Fudou was sent to this school after being part of a huge brawl. What will he do when the only options he has after enrolling are being expelled from that school or being corrected the way the rest of the male students there were...by being forced to dress and act like a girl!

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Fudo Nomura, a delinquent transferred to Private Aichi Symbiosis Academy, an all-girls school that has become co-ed and ruled by female students armed with weapons. Nomura is forced to either comply with the school's rules and act like a girl or be expelled. He instead challenges the "Supreme Five Swords," a five-member vigilante group that enforces the rules, to fight for his right to be himself and prove true morality. The season consists of a series of battles as Nomura confronts each of the Five Swords while gradually befriending them.
